rag_rules: Fix missing semicolon in AGREE assume/guarantee statements to avoid syntax errors
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations in AGREE contracts
Place component type contracts in component type scopes with valid port references
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE expressions preserve type consistency and use only visible identifiers
Use nested if-then-else for branching logic in AGREE contracts
Declare helper functions and constants in the same annex scope as their usage
Place AGREE annexes in valid AADL component type or implementation scopes
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **} blocks
Use pre() expressions with initialized guards for previous-value comparisons
AGREE logical operators include and, or, not(...), and implication =>
anti_patterns: Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the model
Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes
Do not reference unresolved or non-visible AADL features in AGREE expressions
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and with clauses
AGREE validator diagnostics and repair strategies
Model fusion and owner/scope preservation rules
